name: Defender and AV Alerts
description: Captures Microsoft Defender antivirus detections, actions taken, real-time protection status changes, and configuration modifications. Disabled real-time protection (5001, 5010) is a strong indicator of tampering. Check ThreatName and ActionSuccess fields.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.1007: Platform performed action to protect from malware
event_descriptions.1010: Item could not be removed from quarantine
event_descriptions.1013: Antivirus real-time protection scan dropped old item from history
event_descriptions.1116: Antivirus detected malware — ThreatName, Severity, Category, Path, DetectionUser, ProcessName
event_descriptions.1117: Antivirus took action against malware — Action (Quarantine/Remove/Allow), ActionSuccess
event_descriptions.1119: Antivirus remediation failed — threat may still be active
event_descriptions.1120: Antivirus was configured to allow detection
event_descriptions.5001: Real-time protection DISABLED — critical tampering indicator
event_descriptions.5007: Antivirus configuration changed — OldValue, NewValue (check for disabling features)
event_descriptions.5013: Tamper protection blocked operation — TamperType, ProcessName
